subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Two letters from thee have been received, the contents of which testify to thy steadfastness and submission [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو نامه آنجناب وارد مضامین دلیل بر استقامت و تمکین بود الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @freedom of thought and action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
